headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk — Waaree Energies stock hits lower circuit after US duties, signaling market risk for renewables exporters
what_matters: Triggered BRSR, TCFD, GRI frameworks; SEBI scrutiny possible if disclosure weakens; no immediate penalty disclosed.
Tier 1 effect—direct impact on Waaree Energies; possible spillover to Indian solar supply chain.
P/E compression of 5-10% possible if export risk persists; margin erosion likely if US market exposure is significant.
action: Monitor for further regulatory escalation and consider scenario planning for export market risk.
Opportunity: ESG narrative differentiation via proactive disclosure and market diversification
